title: The Night Heaven Fell
writer: Roger Vadim, Jacques Rémy, Albert Vidalie
actors: Brigitte Bardot, Alida Valli, Stephen Boyd
plot: Ursula leaves the convent where she was educated, to start living with her uncle, the count Ribera, and her aunt Florentine. When she arrives, she is confronted with a local drama: a youngman from the village, Lambert, whose siste...
